questions: What is the patient's exact age in years?
Is the patient immuno-compromised (e.g., on long-term steroids, anti-cancer drugs, immunosuppressives, HIV positive)? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have chronic cutaneous/pulmonary disorders? (Yes/No)
Is the patient at increased risk of severe disease? (Yes/No)
What is the time elapsed since rash onset in hours?
Is the patient severely immuno-compromised or an adult with severe disease? (Yes/No)
Is the patient a contact of a severely immunocompromised or pregnant individual (especially first trimester)? (Yes/No)
